source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And this is my little brother George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: This is Mummy Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: This is Daddy Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I'm Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: bou2 mou5
cards.english: [Babysitter]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 豬先生同豬太太今晚要出街
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 tung4 zyu1 taai3 taai2 gam1 maan5 jiu3 ceot1 gaai1
cards.english: Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig are going out tonight.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 豬爺爺同豬嫲嫲過嚟做保母
cards.jyutping: zyu1 je4 je4 tung4 zyu1 maa4 maa4 gwo3 lai2 zou6 bou2 mou5
cards.english: Grandpa Pig and Grandma Pig are coming over to babysit.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: je4 je2 nei5 hou2 maa4 maa4 nei5 hou2
cards.english: Hello Grandpa, hello Grandma.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: je4 je2 hou2 maa4 maa4 hou2
cards.english: Grandpa, hello. Grandma, hello.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 ge3 sam1 gon1 bou2 bui3 nei5 hou2 maa1
cards.english: My precious darlings, how are you?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 hou2 maa1
cards.english: How are you both?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: faan1 soeng5 cong4 laa1 faai3 di1
cards.english: Peppa, George, back to bed now, quickly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: zou2 tau2 laa3 ngo5 ge3 sam1 gon1 bou2 bui3
cards.english: Good night, my precious darlings.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: zou2 tau2 laa3 faai3 di1 fan3 laa1
cards.english: Good night, go to sleep quickly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: zou2 tau2 maa1 mi4 zou2 tau2 de1 dei6
cards.english: Good night, Mummy, good night, Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: zan1 hai6 taai3 ho2 oi3 laa3
cards.english: You are really so adorable.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 ji4 gaa1 faai3 di1 fan3 gaau3 laa3
cards.english: You two go to sleep now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: zi1 dou3 maa1 mi4
cards.english: Okay, Mummy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: ji4 ce2 zung6 hou2 gwaai1 tim1
cards.english: And they are also very well-behaved.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 豬先生同豬太太而家要出去喇
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 tung4 zyu1 taai3 taai2 ji4 gaa1 jiu3 ceot1 heoi3 laa3
cards.english: Mr. and Mrs. Pig are going out now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: tung4 zan1 hai6 hou2 gwaai1 aa3
cards.english: Peppa and George are really well-behaved!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 媽咪一叫佢哋上牀瞓，就即刻做喇
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 jat1 giu3 keoi5 dei6 soeng6 cong4 fan3 zau6 zik1 hak1 zou6 laa3
cards.english: As soon as Mommy told them to go to bed, they did it right away.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 今次做保母真係易做啊
cards.jyutping: gam1 ci3 zou6 bou2 mou5 zan1 hai6 ji6 zou6 aa3
cards.english: Being a babysitter is really easy this time!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: nei5 fan3 zo2 mei6 aa3
cards.english: George, George, are you asleep yet?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: jau5 di1 gwaai3 sing1 wo3
cards.english: There are some strange noises.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 我哋而家係咪應該上樓睇下呢？
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 ji4 gaa1 hai6 mai6 jing1 goi1 soeng5 lau2 tai2 haa6 ne1
cards.english: Should we go upstairs and check it out now?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 hei2 zo2 san1 aa1
cards.english: You guys are up?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: tai2 lai4 jau6 m4 ci5 wo3
cards.english: Doesn't seem like it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 dei6 fan3 gan2 aa3
cards.english: They're sleeping.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 即係話，頭先嗰啲怪聲 唔係Peppa同George整出嚟㗎啦
cards.jyutping: zik1 hai6 waa6 tau4 sin1 go2 di1 gwaai3 sing1 m4 hai6 tung4 zing2 ceot1 lei4 gaa4 laa1
cards.english: So, the strange noises from earlier weren't made by Peppa and George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 me1 sing1 dou1 ting1 m4 dou3 wo3
cards.english: I didn't hear any sounds.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 我諗佢哋兩個真係瞓着咗喇
cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 keoi5 dei6 loeng5 go3 zan1 hai6 fan3 zoek6 zo2 laa3
cards.english: I think those two really are asleep.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 我哋而家睇下電視先啦
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 ji4 gaa1 tai2 haa6 din6 si6 sin1 laa1
cards.english: Let's watch some TV for now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 園藝，今日我哋會講下玫瑰
cards.jyutping: jyun4 ngai6 gam1 jat6 ngo5 dei6 wui6 gong2 haa6 mui4 gwai3
cards.english: Gardening, today we're going to talk about roses.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 哦，我最鍾意就係園藝節目㗎喇
cards.jyutping: ngo4 ngo5 zeoi3 zung1 ji3 zau6 hai6 jyun4 ngai6 zit3 muk6 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: Oh, gardening programs are my favorite.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 奇夫斯基玫瑰非常多刺
cards.jyutping: kei4 fu1 si1 gei1 mui4 gwai3 fei1 soeng4 do1 ci3
cards.english: The Kivsky Rose has a lot of thorns.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: jiu3 sau1 zin2 ge3 waa2
cards.english: If you want to trim them

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 首先就要修剪頂部嘅刺
cards.jyutping: sau2 sin1 zau6 jiu3 sau1 zin2 ding2 bou6 ge3 ci3
cards.english: First, you need to trim the thorns at the top.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: jin4 hau6 zoi3 sau1 zin2 go2 di1 jau6 zi1
cards.english: Then trim the right branches.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: maa4 maa4 aa3
cards.english: Grandma!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 你哋唔係應該瞓緊覺㗎咩？
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 m4 hai6 jing1 goi1 fan3 gan2 gok3 gaa4 me1
cards.english: Shouldn't you two be asleep?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 tung4 jat1 di1 dou1 m4 ngaan5 fan3 laa3
cards.english: George and I aren't sleepy at all!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 我哋可以一齊睇電視嗎？
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 ho2 ji5 jat1 cai4 tai2 din6 si6 maa1
cards.english: Can we watch TV together?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: gam2 ngo5 nam2 tai2 jat1 zan6 din6 si6
cards.english: Well, I think watching TV for a little while

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: ho2 ji5 ling6 nei5 dei6 jau5 seoi6 ji3 ge2
cards.english: might make you sleepy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5
cards.english: Yay!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 冰島玫瑰對於園藝家嚟講 係個非常珍貴嘅品種
cards.jyutping: bing1 dou2 mui4 gwai3 deoi3 jyu1 jyun4 ngai6 gaa1 lai4 gong2 hai6 go3 fei1 soeng4 zan1 gwai3 ge3 ban2 zung2
cards.english: Iceland roses are a very precious variety for horticulturalists.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 但係佢哋至適合喺温和嘅氣候度生長
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 keoi5 dei6 zi3 sik1 hap6 hai2 wan1 wo4 ge3 hei3 hau6 dou6 sang1 zoeng2
cards.english: But they are best suited to grow in mild climates.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 噢，呢個節目真係好無聊啊
cards.jyutping: juk1 ni1 go3 zit3 muk6 zan1 hai6 hou2 mou4 liu4 aa3
cards.english: Oh, this show is so boring.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: juk1
cards.english: Oh.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 爺爺呀，可唔可以玩遊戲啊？
cards.jyutping: je4 je2 aa1 ho2 m4 ho2 ji5 waan2 jau4 hei3 aa3
cards.english: Grandpa, can we play a game?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: nei5 paau1 gou1 ngo5 zoi3 zip3 faan1 laa1
cards.english: Throw me up in the air and catch me!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 好啦，不過每人一次㗎咋
cards.jyutping: hou2 laa1 bat1 gwo3 mui5 jan4 jat1 ci3 ga3 zaa3
cards.english: Okay, but only once each.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 你抱落好似比以前重咗喎
cards.jyutping: nei5 pou5 lok6 hou2 ci5 bei2 ji5 cin4 cung5 zo2 wo3
cards.english: You feel heavier than before.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 leon4 dou3 laa3
cards.english: Now it's George's turn.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: dou3 ngo5
cards.english: My turn.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: gou1 di1
cards.english: Higher...

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 我諗爺爺已經拋到好攰喇
cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 je4 je2 ji5 ging1 paau1 dou3 hou2 gui6 laa3
cards.english: I think grandpa is already tired of throwing.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zi1 laa3
cards.english: I know.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: maa4 maa4 ngo5 dei6 waan2 zuk1 ji1 jan1 laa1
cards.english: Grandma, let's play hide-and-seek!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: nei5 zou6 gwai2 si3 haa6 zuk1 ngo5 dei6 aa1
cards.english: You be "it", try to catch us!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: lai4 zuk1 ngo5 aa1
cards.english: Come catch me!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6 ji4 gaa1 lai4 zuk1 nei5 dei6 laa3
cards.english: I'm coming to catch you now!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 豬先生同豬太太返到嚟屋企喇
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 tung4 zyu1 taai3 taai2 faan1 dou3 lai4 uk1 kei2 laa3
cards.english: Mr. and Mrs. Pig are back home.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.characters: 希望兩隻豬仔仲瞓緊啦
cards.jyutping: hei1 mong6 loeng5 zek3 zyu1 zai2 zung6 fan3 gan2 laa1
cards.english: Hopefully the two piglets are still asleep.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: hou2 maa1 jau5 jan4 hai2 dou6 maa1
cards.english: Okay? Is anyone here?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: baan1 zyu1 zai2 fan3 zoek6 zo2 laa3
cards.english: The piglets have fallen asleep.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E30 Babysitting［保母］
cards.jyutping: lin4 daai6 zyu1 zai2 dou1 hai6 aa3
cards.english: Even the big piglet is too.
